frame_analyses.description: Title slide showing 'Results of the European Basic Laparoscopic Urological Skills Examination'
Split screen showing participant and expert performing peg transfer task with timing at 0:01
Pattern cutting task demonstration with timing at 0:16, showing circular cutting pattern
Endoloop task demonstration at 0:23 showing foam appendage and loop placement
Suturing practice board with numbered positions and marking 'stitch not through the black dot'
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Educational overlay showing common error avoidance

confidence_rationale: This is an academic presentation about E-BLUS study results, not a performance to be scored

verbal_cues: Target time expectations for each task
common_errors_addressed: Incorrect suture placement through marked dots
Time management issues in task completion
Need for skills lab training to improve performance
